transcript: 藞p蓲p藢蕦p 藞mi藧t藢蕦p
definitions: A spontaneously organized, often informal gathering or event that appears suddenly and is typically temporary.
A casual, unannounced social meeting or gathering that is arranged quickly and often in an unexpected location.
examples: We had a pop-up meetup at the park.
The pop-up meetup was a great success.
She announced a pop-up meetup for tomorrow.
